notes: Phase 1 was re-audited before Phase 2 because the authoritative base still contained .gitkeep sentinels and lacked the requested local CI gate.
The repository skeleton now uses app/README.md and infra/README.md, not .gitkeep files.
scripts/local-ci.sh and scripts/local_ci.py define quick, professional, and release lanes; make phase-close maps to the professional lane.
Phase 2 remains the next candidate phase after this ladder repair.
